chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-170 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of MA No.6981/2020. For hearing of main case. 05-12-2022 Appellant present in person. MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J: - Appellant in person has challenged impugned judgment dated 07.11.2020 in Criminal Case No.37 of 2020 arising out of crime No.04/2020, under section 337-F (iv), 337-L (ii), 504, 35 PPC registered at PS Tando Ghulam Hyder, rendered by Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-III, Tando Muhammad Khan, whereby respondents were acquitted of the charge. 2. I have heard appellant in person. No case for upsetting the finding of acquittal recorded in favour of respondents is made out. The learned trial Court has noted various discrepancies in the impugned judgment, sufficient to bring in doubt in the prosecution story. Accordingly, this criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
